note: ProtonBridge default ports. Adjust if your ProtonBridge uses different ports.

setup: 1. Install ProtonBridge desktop app from https://proton.me/bridge
3. Note the IMAP/SMTP ports (defaults: IMAP 1143, SMTP 1025)
4. Store ProtonMail credentials in Azure Key Vault / ProtonPass / Dashlane
5. Update this config if using non-default ports
